CustomField.description: Matching the LLP disk sheet sorting order with the LLP template under the engine template. If Checked, the sorting order on the LLP disk sheet is manually changed. If Unchecked, then the sorting order matches the LLP disk sheet.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Matching LLP disk sheet Sorting order with the LLP template under the engine template. If Checked, the sorting order on the LLP disk sheet is manually changed. If Unchecked, then the sorting order matches the LLP dish sheet.
CustomField.label: Override Sorting Order
